overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night during heavy rain. The scene features neon-lit digital advertising pillars, reflective wet surfaces, glass skyscrapers, and an overhead covered walkway structure. The camera follows pedestrians through the semi-covered urban space before circling a large cylindrical holographic pillar.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian dressed in white who is carrying a bag through the rain-slicked plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing walking ahead, then turning left and moving toward the left side of the frame

entered.detail: futuristic glass and metal elevated walkway structure spanning across the plaza ceiling with illuminated panels
tall cylindrical digital advertising pillar with rotating holographic displays showing colorful abstract patterns
tall modern glass skyscraper with illuminated windows rising on the right side of the plaza
large vertical digital billboard displaying animated advertisements on the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic covered plaza during a rainy night. The camera follows a pedestrian dressed in white walking ahead, while other pedestrians move in opposing directions. Overhead, a glass walkway structure spans the plaza, and in the distance, a cylindrical digital advertising pillar displays rotating holographic content. The wet tiled floor reflects the neon and artificial lighting from the surrounding architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area approaching central digital pillar

events.description: the pedestrian in white exits the frame to the left, and the camera continues forward independently

agents.ego_description: continuing straight through the plaza after the followed pedestrian exits, approaching the central advertising pillar

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing walking away from the camera toward the center of the plaza

entered.detail: large cylindrical digital advertising pillar with prominent ZONA branding and skull icon, displaying yellow and purple holographic content
illuminated seating areas with benches and low hedges on the right side of the walkway
massive vertical holographic display showing a character in combat gear on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: After the pedestrian in white exits left, the camera continues independently through the rain-soaked plaza. The first digital pillar is left behind as the camera approaches a second prominent cylindrical pillar displaying 'ZONA' branding. The plaza opens up with illuminated benches and hedges lining the walkway, while a large holographic billboard becomes visible on the right. The reflective floor mirrors the neon lighting from the surrounding advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with reflective water features and digital installations

events.description: camera approaches the ZONA pillar and begins to circle around it, revealing different angles of the holographic display

agents.ego_description: approaching the ZONA advertising pillar and beginning to circle around it to view the holographic displays from multiple angles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the benches observing the digital displays

entered.detail: black marble or water feature in the center of the plaza floor creating mirror-like reflections of the overhead lights
illuminated bench seating areas with integrated lighting on the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the central plaza area featuring reflective black marble flooring that mirrors the rain and neon lights. The ZONA pillar dominates the center of the frame as the camera approaches and begins to circle it. Other pedestrians are scattered throughout the space, some standing near the illuminated benches. The overhead glass walkway continues to provide partial cover while rain falls visibly through the open sections.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area surrounding the ZONA digital pillar

events.description: camera completes circling the ZONA pillar and begins moving past it, revealing the open plaza beyond

agents.ego_description: circling around the ZONA pillar to view the holographic advertisements from all sides, then continuing past it into the open plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on a bench on the left side, taking shelter from the rain

entered.detail: tall dark glass building facade becoming visible on the left side as the camera circles the pillar
expansive open pedestrian area beyond the ZONA pillar with additional digital signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera completes a circular path around the ZONA pillar, showcasing the vibrant yellow and purple holographic advertisements wrapping around its surface. After circling, the camera moves past the pillar into a more open area of the plaza, revealing additional glass towers on the left and more open space ahead. A pedestrian sits on a bench to the left, and the rain continues to fall steadily throughout the futuristic urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy cyberpunk plaza that shifts from a crowded walkway into a wide, open urban square centered around a holographic monument. It begins by trailing a pedestrian in white beneath a glass overhead structure, where the wet tiled floor reflects the neon glow of distant digital pillars. As the pedestrian departs, the camera glides independently through the rain-soaked environment, passing illuminated benches and hedges before approaching a prominent cylindrical pillar branded with ZONA. The scene then transitions onto reflective black marble flooring as the camera begins a slow, sweeping circle around the ZONA pillar, capturing the vibrant yellow and purple holographic advertisements wrapping around its surface. Finally, the camera moves past the pillar into a more expansive area of the plaza, revealing towering glass skyscrapers and scattered pedestrians under the steady fall of rain.
